URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-functions-host

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Gurge44/EndlessHostRoles
Language: c%23
EHR is the biggest host-only mod for Among Us, with 450+ roles / add-ons and 16 game modes, along with a Custom Team Assigner application to fully customize your games!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/msbuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/msbuild
Language: c%23
The Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) is the build platform for .NET and Visual Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
